summary: High‑quality audience tape capturing a euphoric East Coast show with standout Bird Song, Cold Rain and Snow, and a smoking Help > Slip > Franklin's sequence.
review: The audience recording (AUD) is praised as “right up there” after the Miller mastering, with clear sound and a sweet‑spot taper. The performance shines on Bird Song, Cold Rain and Snow, and an exceptional Help > Slip > Franklin’s, while the Baby Blue encore receives special love.

ai_rating.rationale: The single detailed review rates the show 4 stars and highlights both strong musical moments and an excellent‑sounding audience recording, leading to a high combined rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Taper captured the sweet spot; Miller mastering cleaned up earlier cassette garble, resulting in crisp and well‑balanced sound for an audience source.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: Review notes a euphoric East Coast vibe with smooth transitions; the second‑half highlight (Help > Slip > Franklin's) and the Baby Blue encore are especially praised.
